case_title: JOHNSON, LATONIA GUARDIAN AD LITEM et al VS SAN FRANCISCO RESCUE MISSION DBA SAN FRANCISCO - et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RESCUE MISSION DBA SAN FRANCISCO   - -CHRISTIAN ACADEMY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, LATONIA    GUARDIAN AD LITEM CARPENTER, BRITTANY      MINOR AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RESCUE MISSION DBA SAN FRANCISCO   - -CHRISTIAN ACADEMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PETITION FOR MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM
PETION OF MINOR PLFT/DFT APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM; ACCEPTANCE AND ORDER, ORDER SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-27-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-22-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES SETTLED. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 5/22/01 AT 10AM, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PROCEEDS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE TO BE PLACED INTO A BLOCK ACCOUNT FOR BRITTANY CARPENTER
